text:
Hello everyone,
I’m Akanksha, a student interested in contributing through GSoC 2026. I’ve been using R for coursework and small projects, and I’m currently exploring the contribution workflow and project ideas.
I’m particularly interested in the _Animated interactive ggplots_ project, as it aligns well with my interest in tooling and visualization, and I’m starting to look into existing ggplot extensions and JavaScript-based interactivity.
Looking forward to learning and contributing.
Best,
 Akanksha
